texto: Isn't that the tragedy of growing up though? One day you wake up and realize that everything you are and everything you feel is not much different from what everyone else feels.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Nadine Rose Larter que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Isn't that the tragedy of growing up though? One day you wake up and realize that everything you …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, growing-up, everything, com foco em reflexao.
